positive: A stylized, central composition silhouette of a friendly, mythical creature (such as a whimsical griffin or a forest sprite) interacting with abstract geometric floral elements. The art style should be modern minimalist etching combined with Art Deco patterns. Focus on strong, clean outlines and high contrast, using a limited color palette of emerald green, deep sapphire blue, and burnt orange. The composition should be designed for apparel printing, featuring negative space and easily reproducible lines. The creature and elements should be perfectly balanced and centered. Flat graphic design, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, grain, low detail, artifact, noise, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, poor quality, writing, signature, realistic photo
